programs.name: AWS Activate
programs.description: Cloud credits plus technical support and architecture guidance to build on AWS.
programs.eligibility: Startups at any stage of growth or level of funding.
programs.verifiedAmount: Up to $100,000 in AWS Activate Credits
programs.verifiedNotes: AWS Activate provides startups with cloud credits, technical support, business mentorship, and more.

programs.name: Google for Startups Cloud
programs.description: Google Cloud credits with AI uplift, plus Workspace and Maps discounts.
programs.verifiedNotes: Provides cloud credits and custom solutions to support startup growth.
programs.eligibility: For early stage startups (Seed to Series A) and AI-first startups.

programs.name: Microsoft for Startups Founders Hub
programs.description: Tiered Azure credits plus GitHub, OpenAI credits, and tooling bundled.
programs.verifiedNotes: Microsoft for Startups provides access to AI tools, Azure credits, and guidance for startups.
programs.eligibility: Startups preparing to build on Azure with a focus on growth.

programs.name: DigitalOcean Hatch
programs.description: Up to 12 months of cloud credits — amount depends on partner.
programs.goodFor: Early-stage MVPs, small to mid SaaS
programs.verifiedNotes: DigitalOcean Startups provides cloud credits and support for AI-focused startups to build and scale their products.
programs.eligibility: Must have raised $10m or less and be an AI-native startup.

programs.name: OVHcloud Startup Program
programs.description: Public cloud credits plus 1:1 engineer mentorship. $12K early, $120K scaleups.

programs.name: GitHub for Startups
programs.description: GitHub Enterprise seats for early-stage startups, plus discounted Advanced Security.
programs.goodFor: Code reviews, CI/CD, security from day one
programs.verifiedNotes: GitHub for Startups provides $10,000 in credits for platform tools to eligible early-stage startups.
programs.eligibility: Startups must be affiliated with a partner, funded up to Series B, and new to GitHub Enterprise.

programs.name: MongoDB for Startups
programs.description: Atlas credits, AI model tokens, and 1:1 technical guidance. 50% more credits in 2025.
programs.goodFor: Scalable managed DB from MVP to scale
programs.verifiedNotes: MongoDB for Startups offers credits, technical expertise, and support for startups at all growth stages.
programs.eligibility: Startups must be less than 7 years old and Series A or earlier with a single software-based product.

programs.name: PostHog for Startups
programs.description: Product analytics, feature flags, and session replay on one platform.

programs.name: Notion for Startups
programs.description: Business plan with Notion AI free for 6 months — docs, roadmap, CRM, wiki.
programs.goodFor: Roadmap, investor updates, CRM, docs in one place
programs.verifiedNotes: Notion offers startups free access to its Business plan for up to 6 months to enhance productivity.
programs.eligibility: Non-paying customers with under 100 employees and valid work email.

programs.name: Freshworks for Startups
programs.description: Freshdesk, Freshsales, and the full suite with deep startup discounts.
programs.goodFor: Support, CRM, and sales stack for B2B/B2C
programs.eligibility: DPIIT-recognized Indian startups get up to $10K

programs.name: Zoho for Startups
programs.description: Zoho Wallet credits for the full Zoho One suite (CRM, finance, HR, more).
programs.goodFor: All-in-one SaaS stack at very low cost

programs.name: Miro / Slack / Airtable
programs.description: Startup or nonprofit plans with discounts — often via accelerators or VC hub programs.
programs.searchQuery: Miro for Startups Slack for Startups Airtable for Startups

programs.name: HubSpot for Startups
programs.description: CRM, Marketing, Sales, and Service in one platform with year 2 and 3 discounts.
programs.eligibility: Raised Pre-seed, Seed or Series A funding or affiliated with an approved partner.
programs.verifiedAmount: 30-90% off the tools you need to scale fast
programs.verifiedNotes: Offers significant discounts on HubSpot products for eligible startups.

programs.name: Ad Credits — Google, Meta, TikTok, LinkedIn, Reddit
programs.description: Ad credits via special offers or startup/VC/incubator partner deals.
programs.goodFor: Paid acquisition once you have a working funnel
programs.searchQuery: Google Ads startup credits Meta ad credits TikTok Ads credit

programs.name: Stripe Atlas & Startup Perks
programs.description: US company incorporation, banking, and Stripe setup. Partner discounts include Mercury, AWS.
programs.goodFor: Global SaaS, US-incorporated startups selling worldwide
programs.verifiedNotes: Stripe Atlas offers incorporation services and access to $50,000 in discounts for new startups.
programs.eligibility: Open to startups in over 140 countries.

programs.name: Razorpay Startup Perks & Rize
programs.description: Razorpay Perks: payment credits, zero-balance accounts, payroll. Rize: founder community + $300K–$500K partner credits (AWS, Canva, Notion, more).
programs.goodFor: Indian startups — payments, banking, SaaS credit bundle
programs.verifiedAmount: $11K credits across GCP, AWS, Azure, OpenAI
programs.verifiedNotes: An exclusive program offering mentorship, resources, and incorporation services to early-stage startup founders.
programs.eligibility: Early-stage founders starting new businesses in India.

programs.name: Startup India — Partnered Services
programs.description: Government portal with AWS, GCP, DigitalOcean, Freshworks, Zoho, and more partners.

programs.name: Startup India Seed Fund Scheme (SISFS)
programs.description: Government seed funding for PoC, prototype, trials, and early market entry — distributed via incubators that often bundle extra credits.
programs.goodFor: Indian founders pre-Seed looking for real capital
programs.searchQuery: Startup India Seed Fund Scheme SISFS
programs.verifiedNotes: Financial assistance for proof of concept, prototype development, and commercialization for early-stage startups.
programs.eligibility: Startups under 2 years, recognized by DPIIT, with viable commercialization ideas.

programs.name: Awesome Startup Credits (GitHub list)
programs.description: Community-maintained meta-list of startup credit programs: email, monitoring, logging, design, and more.
programs.goodFor: Finding niche perks — SendGrid, Sentry, Datadog, Figma, Canva
